name: Capella Minerals Limited
summary: Capella Minerals Limited, together with its subsidiaries, acquires, explores for, evaluates, and develops mineral properties in Canada, Sweden, and Norway. It primarily explores for gold and copper deposits, as well as explores for silver and zinc deposits. The company holds interest in Domain, Manitoba, and Savant Lake high-grade gold projects in Ontario, Canada; and Southern Gold Line project in Sweden. It also holds interest in the L√É¬∏kken and Kj√É¬∏li high-grade copper projects located in Norway. The company was formerly known as New Dimension Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Capella Minerals Limited in November 2020. Capella Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Mission, Canada.
